para_trans: Government Order No: LTS 2026 / P.No.116 (1) / A (Class-I)
2. The officers transferred and posted under the said order shall be ex-officio liable under this order.
Relaxation is being done and it is about redeployment of these officers at the field level.
There is no need to execute the command. Accordingly, the Executive Engineer concerned is transferred.
Join immediately at the place of posting.
3. The date on which the officer concerned is to appear at the place of posting for transfer.
relieved and the date on which he appeared at the place of transfer to the Government.
The email doesttclass1.wrd@maharashtra.gov.in should be notified immediately on the website.
4. Relating to the positions being transferred by the said order.
On joining the officer, the additional charge of the post concerned is as per the earlier order.
If handed over to the officer, it will automatically terminate.
5. Leave granted to the officer concerned for any reason without prior approval of the Government.
Don't do it. Also transferred by original office as per Rule-30 (c) of M.N.S. (Leave) Rules, 1981.
No leave applications of the incumbent should be accepted. If such an application is received, it shall be

Payments must be made by post to the relevant officer at the original address. to the original office.

6. failing to appear at the place of immediate appointment in accordance with the said transfer order or any
If an attempt is made to cancel the transfer under duress, this action is taken by the Maharashtra Civil Service.
Being in violation of Rule 23 of the (Conduct) Rules 1979, it is considered misconduct.
Those concerned should note that disciplinary action will be taken against them.
7. This Government Order is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
